greeting.heading: Ethan Nguyen
greeting.description: I create full-stack web applications and mobile apps.

intro.heading: "I think we can say, we are living the impossible."
intro.description: I enjoy staying up-to-date on current technology news and expanding my knowledge in the rapidly growing industry. Outside of software development, I also work on broadcast engineering, scholastic esports initiatives and community-building projects!

timeline.title:
Bachelor of Science, Computer Science
Minor in Business Administration
timeline.subtitle: Northern Illinois University

skills.heading: Skills
skills.description: My greatest strength is my ability to quickly grasp new concepts and adapt to different programming languages and tools. This flexibility has allowed me to pull off an array of projects of all shapes and sizes!

list.heading: Web development
list.cover_description: I've worked on various full-stack web projects of different sizes and complexity, and I'm always up for the next challenge 👊
list.description:
I enjoy building web apps with modern full-stack technologies like Next.js, Node.js, and React. That said, many of my personal projects thrive on the simplicity of vanilla web technologies and GitHub Pages. For (smaller) personal projects, I've found that they're quick to set up and, best of all, cost nothing to publish and show off to the world! :D
This portfolio was made with vanilla HTML/CSS, JavaScript, and a sprinkle of Bootstrap for a responsive design. ✨

list.heading: Mobile development
list.cover_description: Much of my free time is spent exploring iOS development and experimenting with Apple's tools and frameworks.
list.description: I've always been fascinated by user-friendly software. iOS stood out to me because of its strong emphasis on design consistency and delivering polished user experiences. I've built a number of mini projects to familiarize myself with the various iOS frameworks and principles. One of my favorite to date has to be DontEatMyContent, a tweak for the iOS YouTube app which prevents display cutouts (e.g. Dynamic Island) from interfering with videos for a better viewing experience.

list.heading: Automation & scripting
list.cover_description: Command-line tools are my go-to when I need to get the job done without unnecessary frills.
list.description: Shell scripting is goated 🐐. It's been a huge and crucial part of my toolkit. I've used it for all kinds of things, from compiling and packaging my code to tinkering with system services. And I think it might just be the perfect tool for automating repetitive tasks.

list.heading: Database programming
list.cover_description: "Why did the database engineer leave his wife?"
list.description:
"She had one-to-many relationships." 🥁
I've worked extensively with MySQL and SQLite, turning messy real-world data into clean, well-structured schemas. I also write efficient queries (sometimes) that power analytics across years of historical data.
